creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey, looks like it is better than the version in the BSD# repo: mine build correctly but gtk-sharp20 fails to build with some strange error during staging:https://packages.blogreen.org/data/10_3_RELEASE_amd64-mono/2016-09-25_14h39m23s/logs/errors/gtk-sharp20-2.12.40.log

The main difference I guess is that I lack the libinotify dependency… very good catch!

Regarding the PATCH* variable, I did not removed them because I got tired of searching them back in the history of the Makefile, but feel free to remove them if you think it is too much encumbering.

Looks good to me!
